description_long: This object is a roughly triangular, pointed stone with a slightly asymmetrical outline and a textured, chipped surface. The stone displays a range of off-white to light tan hues, with subtle mottling and some darker patches, suggesting natural mineral inclusions. Its edges are irregular and appear to have been shaped or fractured, giving it a primitive, hand-worked appearance. The stone is relatively thin when viewed from the side, tapering to a sharp point at one end and a broader, blunted base at the other. The surface is matte and uneven, with visible micro-pitting and roughness typical of unpolished quartz or chert. This type of stone could be found as a natural obstacle or as a remnant of construction or landscaping in an urban environment.
description: A pointed, roughly triangular stone with a chipped, textured surface in off-white and tan hues, featuring irregular edges and a matte finish.
description_view_0: The stone appears broad and triangular, with a pointed tip and a wider, uneven base; surface texture and color variations are clearly visible.
description_view_1: The stone is seen edge-on, revealing its thin profile and the sharpness of its point, with subtle color gradations along the edge.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, but the surface appears slightly smoother and the base is less irregular, with more uniform coloration.
description_view_3: Another edge-on view, showing the stone's thinness and the rough, chipped texture along its length, with a visible darker patch.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or scattered among landscaping elements
attribute_pattern: Subtle mottling and mineral inclusions with irregular, chipped edges; no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Rough and unpolished, with visible micro-pitting and minor discoloration indicating moderate natural weathering.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with soil, gravel, or other stones in landscaping, but may contrast with concrete or metal urban features.
